name: community contribution promotion to tier-1 succeeds when the entry has the required two reviewers and all fields
command:
mkdir -p community/sources && printf 'id: x
contributor: alice
review_status: approved
eval_evidence: passing
license: MIT
reviewers: [bob, carol]
proposed_tier: 1
' > community/sources/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/community/promote.sh" --entry community/sources/x.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'promoted=true' out.txt && grep -q 'tier=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
